---
title: Reference template
description: A lookup-oriented layout for APIs, configuration keys, commands, and syntax.
---

Use this layout when readers need facts on demand — not a story or a walkthrough.

## The goal

Provide a strict, lookup-oriented directory of facts, API specs, configuration keys, or command syntax. This is for quick scanning, not casual reading.

## The tone

Stark, literal, objective, and dense. Exhaustive technical details belong entirely in this quadrant.

## Recommended layout

### Syntax or blueprint

The exact format of the code, command, or file structure.

### Parameters or options table

A clear table mapping fields, types, default values, and descriptions.

### Examples

Pure code blocks or configuration snippets showing valid implementations.
